prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Scheme. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```scheme
#!/usr/bin/env gsi-script

;; minigit implementation in Scheme

(define *repo-dir* ".minigit")
(define *index-file* (string-append *repo-dir* "/index"))
(define *objects-dir* (string-append *repo-dir* "/objects"))

(define (system-assert cmd)
  (let ((res (system cmd)))
    (unless (zero? res)
      (error "System command failed:" cmd))))

(define (ensure-repo)
  (unless (file-exists? *repo-dir*)
    (error "Not a minigit repository")))

(define (cmd-init)
  (if (file-exists? *repo-dir*)
      (error "Already a minigit repository")
      (begin
        (system-assert (string-append "mkdir -p " *repo-dir* "/objects"))
        (system-assert (string-append "touch " *index-file*))
        (display "Initialized empty minigit repository\n"))))

(define (file-exists? f) (file-exists f))

(define (sha1-file f)
  (let* ((port (open-input-file f))
         (content (read-line port #f))
         (size (file-size f))
         (header (string-append "blob " (number->string size) "\0"))
         (store (string-append header content))
         (hash (string-append (car (system-return (string-append "echo -n \""
                                                                store
                                                                "\" | sha1sum")))
                              "")))
    (close-input-port port)
    (string-take hash 40)))

(define (string-take s n)
  (substring s 0 n))

(define (file-size f)
  (let ((port (open-input-file f)))
    (let loop ((count 0))
      (let ((c (read-char port)))
        (if (eof-object? c)
            (begin (close-input-file port) count)
            (loop (+ count 1)))))))

(define (system-return cmd)
  (let ((tmp "/tmp/minigit-stdout"))
    (system-assert (string-append cmd " > " tmp))
    (let ((port (open-input-file tmp))
          (out '()))
      (let loop ((line (read-line port)))
        (if (eof-object? line)
            (begin (close-input-file port) (reverse out))
            (loop (read-line port) (cons line out)))))))

(define (cmd-add . files)
  (ensure-repo)
  (let ((index-port (open-output-file (string-append *index-file* ".tmp") 'append)))
    (for-each
     (lambda (f)
       (if (file-exists? f)
           (let ((hash (sha1-file f)))
             (system-assert (string-append "mkdir -p " *objects-dir* "/" (substring hash 0 2)))
             (system-assert (string-append "cp " " " f " " *objects-dir* "/" (substring hash 0 2) "/" (substring hash 2)))
             (display (string-append hash " " f "\n") index-port))
           (error (string-append "file not found: " f))))
     files)
    (close-output-port index-port)
    (system-assert (string-append "mv " *index-file* ".tmp " *index-file*))))

(define (cmd-ls)
  (ensure-repo)
  (if (file-exists? *index-file*)
      (let ((port (open-input-file *index-file*)))
        (let loop ((line (read-line port)))
          (unless (eof-object? line)
            (display (string-append (substring line 41) "\n"))
            (loop (read-line port))))
        (close-input-port port))
      '()))

(define (cmd-rm . files)
  (ensure-repo)
  (let ((lines (if (file-exists? *index-file*)
                   (let ((port (open-input-file *index-file*)))
                     (let loop ((line (read-line port)) (acc '()))
                       (if (eof-object? line)
                           (begin (close-input-file port) (reverse acc))
                           (loop (read-line port) (cons line acc)))))
                   '()))
        (new-lines '()))
    (for-each
     (lambda (line)
       (let ((f (substring line 41)))
         (if (member f files)
             '()
             (set! new-lines (cons line new-lines)))))
     lines)
    (let ((index-port (open-output-file (string-append *index-file* ".tmp"))))
      (for-each
       (lambda (line)
         (display (string-append line "\n") index-port))
       (reverse new-lines))
      (close-output-port index-port)
      (system-assert (string-append "mv " *index-file* ".tmp " *index-file*)))))

(define (cmd-status)
  (ensure-repo)
  (let ((indexed '())
        (working '())
        (missing '())
        (untracked '()))
    ;; collect indexed files
    (if (file-exists? *index-file*)
        (let ((port (open-input-file *index-file*)))
          (let loop ((line (read-line port)))
            (if (eof-object? line)
                (close-input-port port)
                (begin
                  (set! indexed (cons (substring line 41) indexed))
                  (loop (read-line port))))))
    ;; collect working files
    (set! working (system-return "find . -type f -not -path './.minigit/*' | sort"))
    ;; check each indexed file
    (for-each
     (lambda (f)
       (if (file-exists? f)
           '()
           (set! missing (cons f missing))))
     indexed)
    ;; check for untracked
    (for-each
     (lambda (f)
       (if (member f indexed)
           '()
           (set! untracked (cons f untracked))))
     working)
    ;; output
    (if (null? missing)
        '()
        (begin
          (display "missing:\n")
          (for-each (lambda (f) (display (string-append "  " f "\n"))) (sort missing))))
    (if (null? untracked)
        '()
        (begin
          (display "untracked:\n")
          (for-each (lambda (f) (display (string-append "  " f "\n"))) (sort untracked))))
    (if (and (null? missing) (null? untracked))
        (display "clean\n")
        '())))

(define (sort lst) (list-sort string<? lst))

(define (cmd-commit)
  (ensure-repo)
  (let ((index-port (open-input-file *index-file*)))
    (let ((line (read-line index-port)))
      (if (eof-object? line)
          (error "empty commit not allowed")
          (begin
            (close-input-port index-port)
            (display "committed\n"))))))

(define (cmd-hash-object f)
  (if (file-exists? f)
      (display (string-append (sha1-file f) "\n"))
      (error (string-append "file not found: " f))))

(define (usage)
  (display "usage: minigit <command> [<args>...]\n")
  (display "commands:\n")
  (display "  init\n")
  (display "  add <file>...\n")
  (display "  ls\n")
  (display "  rm <file>...\n")
  (display "  status\n")
  (display "  commit\n")
  (display "  hash-object <file>\n")
  (exit 1))

(define (main args)
  (if (null? args)
      (usage)
      (let ((cmd (car args)))
        (cond
         ((equal? cmd "init") (cmd-init))
         ((equal? cmd "add") (apply cmd-add (cdr args)))
         ((equal? cmd "ls") (cmd-ls))
         ((equal? cmd "rm") (apply cmd-rm (cdr args)))
         ((equal? cmd "status") (cmd-status))
         ((equal? cmd "commit") (cmd-commit))
         ((equal? cmd "hash-object") (cmd-hash-object (cadr args)))
         (else (usage))))))

(main (command-line))
```
